title: Show HN: Mindwalk – Replay coding-agent sessions on a 3D map of your codebase
summary: Mindwalk 是一个开源工具，可在代码库的3D地图上回放编码代理会话，帮助开发者可视化代理行为。
translated_summary: Mindwalk is an open-source tool that replays coding-agent sessions on a 3D map of your codebase, helping developers visualize agent behavior.
